title: Partially Bitten Dessert Macro Ad AI
sourceTitle: Partially Bitten Dessert Macro Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Realistic premium dessert product advertisement featuring partially bitten fictional layered wafer dessert on a ceramic plate, crumbs and used fork nearby. Subject: partially bitten fictional layered wafer dessert on a ceramic plate, crumbs and used fork nearby is the macro food hero, partially bitten to reveal layered filling, crumbs, cake or wafer texture, and appetizing interior structure. Scene: softly blurred high-end restaurant table with tiny fictional logo and slogan at top creates the high-end restaurant or premium cafe environment, with plate, fork, knife, crumbs, blurred background, and small brand placement at the top. Composition: Fixed close product-ad crop: dessert rests on a plate in the foreground, bitten edge faces the viewer, crumbs scatter naturally, used fork and knife sit nearby, and the blurred restaurant background stays secondary. Signature Elements: Partially bitten dessert, visible layered filling, scattered crumbs, used fork and knife, ceramic plate, blurred high-end restaurant background, small top logo, and premium macro ad finish. Style: Ultra-realistic commercial food photography with premium dessert advertising polish, appetizing macro texture, high-end restaurant atmosphere, soft shallow depth of field, and believable plated-product realism. Color Palette: Warm dessert tones, ceramic plate white, cream and cake layer contrast, polished metal cutlery highlights, blurred restaurant neutrals, and restrained brand text accents. Lighting: Soft premium restaurant lighting with glossy filling highlights, crisp crumb texture, gentle plate shadows, polished fork reflections, and shallow-depth background glow. Camera: Macro three-quarter tabletop camera with bitten edge and layered filling in sharp focus, plate and cutlery readable, and background smoothly blurred. Typography: LUMA BITE / layered cocoa wafer appears as a small white logo and tiny fitting slogan at the top, readable but not overpowering the food hero. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
